Overrides.Override: 15% increased Reservation Efficiency of Skills Auras from your Skills which affect Allies also affect Enemies Limited to 1 Runegraft of Treachery
Arcane Surge also grants 15% increased Life Regeneration Rate to you Limited to 1 Runegraft of Resurgence

Items.Item: Rarity: UNIQUE Rational Doctrine Cobalt Jewel Unique ID: 0ebdbd6f94a88b18fb7c993edf4854dfe83572a4522f532ed38d56f79d585651 Item Level: 87 Implicits: 3 +3 to maximum Energy Shield 3% increased Stun Duration on Enemies 6% increased Stun and Block Recovery You have Consecrated Ground around you while stationary if Strength is your highest Attribute 25% chance to create Profane Ground on Critical Strike if Intelligence is your highest Attribute Effects of Consecrated Ground you create Linger for 4 seconds Effects of Profane Ground you create Linger for 4 seconds

Rarity: RARE Viper Halo Royal Burgonet Armour: 505 ArmourBasePercentile: 0.2251 Unique ID: 70fadf0442c724a1a27e4c69cccc6f610b9034a501947aa6ecf65176ffa3f133 Searing Exarch Item Eater of Worlds Item Item Level: 85 Quality: 20 Sockets: G-R-R-R LevelReq: 65 Implicits: 2 9% increased Mana Reservation Efficiency of Skills Minions have 20% increased maximum Life {fractured}+2 to Level of all Minion Skill Gems +31 to Armour +149 to maximum Life 21% increased Life Regeneration rate +47% to Fire Resistance {crafted}+15% to Fire and Chaos Resistances Fractured Item

Input.string:
# Companionship (only one marionette) 80% more minion life
spells have 20% chance to deal double damage- gain 10% of physical damage as extra fire damage- +4% to global critical strike multiplier-
+4% to maximum fire resistance-
minions have 10% increased maximum life-
Input.name: customMods
